title: pellionia angularis
intro: Pellionia angularis, also known as the Angel Wings plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pellionia angularis include its ability to treat fever, headache, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of Pellionia angularis include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or applying them directly to the affected area.
